name: dinotrust enforce
description: Code-level enforcement layer for dinotrust. Hard-blocks protected-resource access (.env/secrets/keys) and non-owner write/exec at the runtime tool boundary via before_tool_call — model-independent, sits beneath the AGENTS.md instruction layer.

agentFilter.description: Only enforce on sessions whose sessionKey includes this substring. Empty string = all agents.

ownerIds.description: Verified platform sender IDs allowed to run mutating/exec tools. Owner-gate is only applied when a senderId is resolvable from context; otherwise falls back to instruction layer.

protectedGlobs.description: Secret globs hard-blocked from NON-OWNER tools. Owner is warn-only (never blocked). openclaw.json intentionally NOT here for the live owner-operated agent.

ownerWarnOnly.description: When true, owner / agent-operated-by-owner sessions are NEVER hard-blocked, only warn-logged — EXCEPT criticalExecPatterns/criticalPathGlobs which trigger requireApproval (are-you-sure) even for owner. Matches dinotrust owner_rules.

criticalExecPatterns.description: Regex patterns for critical/irreversible exec commands. Owner gets requireApproval (are-you-sure) instead of silent pass; non-owner is already blocked from exec anyway.

criticalPathGlobs.description: Path globs where an owner WRITE/edit triggers requireApproval (are-you-sure). Config + security files that are dangerous to change silently.

mutatingTools.description: Tools treated as mutating/exec for the non-owner gate.

nonOwnerAllowedTools.description: Non-mutating tools a non-owner MAY call directly (mirrors AGENTS.md non_owner_rules.allowed web/memory tools).

nonOwnerAllowedScripts.description: Non-owner exec allowlist: exec permitted ONLY when it runs one of these read-only tool scripts under tools/. Any other non-owner exec is blocked.

enforce.description: Master switch. false = observe/log only (no blocking), for safe dry-run.
